channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Legal expert raises concerns over Trump judicial nominees’ refusal to affirm 2020 election results
item.description: A legal expert has expressed alarm over what he describes as a troubling pattern among several judicial nominees put forward by President Donald Trump. During recent Senate Judiciary Committee hearing...

item.title: Former Army General Criticizes Pete Hegseth's West Point Remarks on Military Accountability
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth faced criticism following a commencement speech delivered at the U.S. Military Academy at West Point on May 23, 2026. During the address, Hegseth spoke about the Trump a...

item.title: Tencent launches inbound payment upgrade to simplify payments for international visitors ahead of APEC 2026
item.description: Tencent has announced a major upgrade to its inbound payment ecosystem as part of the “2026 Inbound Payment Service Upgrade Initiative,” unveiled at the Shenzhen International Financial Expo in prepar...

item.title: Dawn French backs legalisation of assisted dying in the UK and speaks about fears of ageing
item.description: Actress and comedian Dawn French has publicly supported the legalisation of assisted dying in the United Kingdom, describing the issue as “a no-brainer” provided that strict safeguards and proper cons...

item.title: PM Shehbaz highlights Youm-i-Takbeer as a symbol of Pakistan’s nuclear strength, sovereignty and national unity
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif, in his message on Youm-i-Takbeer, described the occasion as a defining moment in Pakistan’s history when the country emerged as a nuclear power on May 28, 1998. He said ...

item.title: Philippines and Japan to upgrade bilateral relations to Comprehensive Strategic Partnership, Marcos says
item.description: President Ferdinand Marcos Jr. announced that the Philippines and Japan are set to elevate their bilateral relations to a Comprehensive Strategic Partnership, marking the highest level in the Philippi...

item.title: Lindsey Graham Draws Criticism After Suggesting Trump Deserves a Nobel Prize for Middle East Diplomacy
item.description: Sen. Lindsey Graham appeared on Fox News with host Sean Hannity to discuss President Donald Trump’s foreign policy efforts in the Middle East, including ongoing negotiations related to the conflict in...

item.title: Norm Eisen Criticizes Trump Administration Over Criminal Investigation Into E. Jean Carroll
item.description: A Raw Story article reports on criticism directed at the Trump administration after news emerged that the Department of Justice had launched a criminal investigation into writer E. Jean Carroll. Carro...

item.title: Texas Senate Race Between Ken Paxton and James Talarico Raises Financial Concerns for Republicans
item.description: The upcoming Texas Senate race between Republican Attorney General Ken Paxton and Democratic state Representative James Talarico is already creating concern among Republican strategists because of the...

item.title: Marco MacLeod appointed to oversee Nova Scotia’s energy department as Tim Houston reorganizes cabinet responsibilities
item.description: Nova Scotia Premier Tim Houston has transferred responsibility for the province’s energy department to Marco MacLeod as part of a government leadership and cabinet restructuring effort. The move signa...

item.title: Alcohol consumption in British Columbia reaches a 20-year low while remaining above the national average
item.description: A new report from the Office of the Provincial Health Officer in British Columbia shows that alcohol consumption in the province has declined to its lowest level in 20 years. Despite this encouraging ...

item.title: Gretchen Carlson Criticizes DOJ Investigation Into E. Jean Carroll Case and Related Actions
item.description: Former Fox News anchor Gretchen Carlson expressed strong criticism during a CNN appearance regarding recent actions by the U.S. Department of Justice under President Donald Trump. Carlson reacted shar...

item.title: Commentator raises concerns after video shows Trump swaying during Memorial Day ceremony
item.description: A political commentator sparked online discussion after analyzing a video from a Memorial Day ceremony in which U.S. President Donald Trump appeared to sway while standing during a military salute at ...

item.title: Spencer Pratt distinguishes his Los Angeles mayoral campaign from Trump on immigration policy
item.description: Los Angeles mayoral candidate Spencer Pratt, a former reality TV personality, has drawn comparisons to President Donald Trump due to their shared background in entertainment and similar emphasis on to...

item.title: Federal Judge Orders Customs Chief to Explain Delays in Trump Tariff Refunds
item.description: A federal trade court judge has ordered Rodney S. Scott, the head of U.S. Customs and Border Protection under President Donald Trump, to appear at a hearing concerning the administration’s handling of...

item.title: Bill Maher critiques Trump’s handling of Iran conflict while supporting overall strategy
item.description: Comedian Bill Maher commented on the Trump administration’s handling of the ongoing conflict involving Iran during an appearance on the podcast “Hot Mics With Billy Bush.” While Maher stated that he g...

item.title: Vintage Photos Showcase Mid-Century Curtain Design Trends of the 1950s and 1960s
item.description: The article explores the popularity and stylistic importance of curtains during the 1950s and 1960s, a period described as the “Golden Age of Curtains.” According to the feature, window treatments bec...

item.title: Trump sparks controversy after warning Oman over Strait of Hormuz remarks during Cabinet meeting
item.description: During a Cabinet meeting held at the White House, U.S. President Donald Trump made controversial remarks regarding the strategic Strait of Hormuz and the role of regional countries, including Oman. Wh...

item.title: Glenn Kirschner Questions Pam Bondi’s Return to Trump Administration and Links It to Epstein File Controversy
item.description: A new report from Raw Story highlights comments made by former federal prosecutor and 'Justice Matters' podcast host Glenn Kirschner regarding Pam Bondi’s return to President Donald Trump’s administra...

item.title: UEFA Five-Year Coefficient Keeps Manchester City Above Arsenal in European Rankings
item.description: Arsenal may have ended their long wait for a Premier League title, but the club is still ranked below Manchester City and Liverpool in UEFA’s latest European club rankings. The rankings are based on U...
